error_signature: invalid JSON due to line breaks
title: Invalid JSON caused by line breaks in dynamic content
symptom: The JSON structure is flagged as invalid when including dynamic content with line breaks, causing the workflow to fail.
applies_when: Using a dynamic value in JSON
The dynamic value contains line breaks
not_this_if: Dynamic value does not contain line breaks
JSON is static and does not change
root_cause: When dynamic content includes line breaks, it can disrupt the JSON format, leading to parsing errors. JSON requires proper escaping of special characters to maintain validity.
fix_steps: Wrap the dynamic value in JSON.stringify()
Ensure the entire JSON structure is correctly formatted
Test the workflow again to confirm validity
agent_instruction: Use JSON.stringify() on the dynamic value to escape line breaks and ensure valid JSON.
